diagrams.title: Resource Allocation Graph - No Deadlock
diagrams.description: System with 2 processes and 2 resource types showing no deadlock
elements: R1 (resource square with 2 dots for 2 instances)
R2 (resource square with 2 dots for 2 instances)
diagrams.purpose: Shows a safe state where no cycle with single-instance resources exists - no deadlock

diagrams.title: Resource Allocation Graph - Deadlock State
diagrams.description: System showing deadlock with circular wait
elements: P1, P2, P3 as process circles
R1, R2 as resource squares with 1 instance each (1 dot)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates how a cycle in RAG with single-instance resources indicates deadlock

diagrams.title: Coffman Conditions Visualization
elements: Condition 1: Mutual Exclusion - single resource block
Condition 2: Hold and Wait - process holding one resource waiting for another
Condition 3: No Preemption - locked resource arrow
Condition 4: Circular Wait - circular arrow chain P1→P2→P3→P1
diagrams.purpose: Visual representation of all four Coffman conditions that must exist simultaneously for deadlock
